## What

Summary of the change and the motivation.

## How

Notes on the approach, trade-offs, and anything reviewers should focus on.

## Checklist

- [ ] `scripts/verify` passes (format check, clippy `-D warnings`, server
      tests, frontend build + tests)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Changes touching operation handling, the revision log, or the client
      state machine keep the convergence tests green
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commit subjects follow Conventional Commits
